query:
ALTER TABLE projects 
  MODIFY COLUMN status ENUM('inquiry','calculation','offer','order','production','shipping','completed','cancelled','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'inquiry',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS archived_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS rejection_reason ENUM('preis','timing','wettbewerber','kein_feedback','sonstiges') NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS rejection_note TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reactivated_at TIMESTAMP NULL;
command:

  MODIFY COLUMN status ENUM('inquiry','calculation','offer','order','production','shipping','completed','cancelled','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'inquiry',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS archived_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS rejection_reason ENUM('preis','timing','wettbewerber','kein_feedback','sonstiges') NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS rejection_note TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reactivated_at TIMESTAMP NULL;
